name: local
description: PR navigation, review, fix, creation, and Linear/TIB-TIP authoring slash commands. Ten user-invokable skills (pr-switch, pr-review-local, pr-review-gh, pr-fix, setup, pr-create, extract-plan, tib-create, tip-create, tib-ship) plus the pr-review-engine dispatcher skill, and a 15-agent review library (6 baseline + 9 conditional, including route-level runtime validation).
